title: tests/openAiService.test.js (oai-1–oai-5)
task: Create tests/openAiService.test.js with injectable mock client per DEC-0009. Cover: oai-1-schema-enum, oai-2-valid-category, oai-3-unknown-null, oai-4-refusal, oai-5-429-exception.
acceptance: oai-3-unknown-null: enum UNKNOWN returns { category: null, response: 'UNKNOWN', prompt }
oai-4-refusal: message.refusal returns { category: null, response: refusal, prompt }
oai-5-429-exception: mock reject with APIError(429) throws with .code === 429
Uses OpenAiService.createForTest({ client: { chat: { completions: { create: mock } } } })
Picked up by node --test tests/ (no runner change)
